Clinic Information

PNG/JPG recommended. Will appear on all printed job cards and POs.

Not connected — enter your Google Apps Script URL below to enable live sync.
 Connection Settings

Paste the URL after deploying the Apps Script below as a Web App.

The long ID in your Google Sheet URL between /d/ and /edit

 Sync Data
 Push to Google Sheets

Upload all local data (Inward, Outward, Repairs, etc.) to your Google Sheet. This overwrites existing sheet data.

 Pull from Google Sheets

Download all data from your Google Sheet into the app. Replaces current local data.

Last sync: Never
 Auto-Sync Setting

When enabled, every change is immediately saved to Google Sheets. May be slower on poor internet.

 Setup Guide — Google Apps Script
  1. Open Google Sheets and create a new spreadsheet.
  2. Name it ClearSound_DB (or any name).
  3. Go to Extensions → Apps Script.
  4. Delete any existing code and paste the script below.
  5. Click Deploy → New Deployment.
  6. Select type: Web App. Execute as: Me. Access: Anyone.
  7. Click Deploy, authorize permissions, copy the Web App URL.
  8. Paste the URL above and click Save & Test Connection.
 Google Apps Script Code (copy all)
const SHEET_TABS = ['inward','outward','repairs','customOrders','wholesale','purchaseOrders','suppliers','stock','stockMovement','users','settings'];

function doPost(e) {
  try {
    const params = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);
    const action = params.action;
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();

    // ── PING ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'ping') return jsonResponse({ success:true, message:'Connected!' });

    // ── PUSH ALL (overwrite entire DB) ────────────────────────
    if (action === 'pushAll') {
      const db = params.db;
      SHEET_TABS.forEach(tab => {
        let sheet = ss.getSheetByName(tab);
        if (!sheet) sheet = ss.insertSheet(tab);
        sheet.clearContents();
        const data = db[tab];
        if (!data) return;
        if (tab === 'settings') {
          const entries = Object.entries(data);
          if (!entries.length) return;
          sheet.getRange(1,1,1,2).setValues([['Key','Value']]);
          const rows = entries.map(([k,v]) => [k, v !== undefined && v !== null ? String(v) : '']);
          sheet.getRange(2,1,rows.length,2).setValues(rows);
        } else {
          if (!data.length) return;
          const keys = Object.keys(data[0]);
          sheet.getRange(1,1,1,keys.length).setValues([keys]);
          const rows = data.map(r => keys.map(k => r[k] !== undefined ? r[k] : ''));
          sheet.getRange(2,1,rows.length,keys.length).setValues(rows);
        }
      });
      return jsonResponse({ success:true });
    }

    // ── PULL ALL (read entire DB) ──────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'pullAll') {
      const db = {};
      SHEET_TABS.forEach(tab => {
        const sheet = ss.getSheetByName(tab);
        if (!sheet) { db[tab] = tab === 'settings' ? {} : []; return; }
        const vals = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
        if (!vals.length || !vals[0].length) { db[tab] = tab === 'settings' ? {} : []; return; }
        if (tab === 'settings') {
          const obj = {};
          for (let i = 1; i < vals.length; i++) obj[vals[i][0]] = vals[i][1];
          db[tab] = obj;
        } else {
          const headers = vals[0];
          db[tab] = vals.slice(1).map(row => {
            const r = {};
            headers.forEach((h,i) => r[h] = row[i] !== undefined ? row[i] : '');
            return r;
          });
        }
      });
      return jsonResponse({ success:true, db });
    }

    // ── SAVE SETTINGS ────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'saveSettings') {
      const data = params.data;
      if (!data) return jsonResponse({ success:false, error:'No data provided' });
      let sheet = ss.getSheetByName('settings');
      if (!sheet) sheet = ss.insertSheet('settings');
      sheet.clearContents();
      sheet.getRange(1,1,1,2).setValues([['Key','Value']]);
      const rows = Object.entries(data).map(([k,v]) => [k, v !== undefined && v !== null ? String(v) : '']);
      if (rows.length > 0) sheet.getRange(2,1,rows.length,2).setValues(rows);
      return jsonResponse({ success:true });
    }

    // ── GET SETTINGS ─────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'getSettings') {
      const sheet = ss.getSheetByName('settings');
      if (!sheet) return jsonResponse({ success:true, data:{} });
      const vals = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
      if (!vals || vals.length < 2) return jsonResponse({ success:true, data:{} });
      const obj = {};
      for (let i = 1; i < vals.length; i++) {
        if (vals[i][0]) obj[vals[i][0]] = vals[i][1];
      }
      return jsonResponse({ success:true, data:obj });
    }

    // ── APPEND ROW ────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'appendRow') {
      const sheet = getOrCreateSheet(ss, params.tab);
      const data = params.data;
      const vals = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
      if (!vals.length || !vals[0].some(v => v !== '')) {
        // Write header row first
        const keys = Object.keys(data);
        sheet.getRange(1,1,1,keys.length).setValues([keys]);
        sheet.appendRow(keys.map(k => data[k] !== undefined ? data[k] : ''));
      } else {
        const keys = vals[0];
        sheet.appendRow(keys.map(k => data[k] !== undefined ? data[k] : ''));
      }
      return jsonResponse({ success:true });
    }

    // ── UPDATE ROW ────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'updateRow') {
      const sheet = getOrCreateSheet(ss, params.tab);
      const data = params.data;
      const slNo = String(data['SL.NO']);
      const vals = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
      const headers = vals[0];
      const slIdx = headers.indexOf('SL.NO');
      for (let i = 1; i < vals.length; i++) {
        if (String(vals[i][slIdx]) === slNo) {
          sheet.getRange(i+1,1,1,headers.length).setValues([headers.map(k => data[k] !== undefined ? data[k] : vals[i][headers.indexOf(k)])]);
          return jsonResponse({ success:true });
        }
      }
      return jsonResponse({ success:false, error:'Row not found' });
    }

    // ── DELETE ROW ────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'deleteRow') {
      const sheet = getOrCreateSheet(ss, params.tab);
      const slNo = String(params.slNo);
      const vals = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
      const slIdx = vals[0].indexOf('SL.NO');
      for (let i = 1; i < vals.length; i++) {
        if (String(vals[i][slIdx]) === slNo) {
          sheet.deleteRow(i+1);
          return jsonResponse({ success:true });
        }
      }
      return jsonResponse({ success:false, error:'Row not found' });
    }

    return jsonResponse({ success:false, error:'Unknown action: ' + action });
  } catch(err) {
    return jsonResponse({ success:false, error: err.message });
  }
}

function doGet(e) {
  return jsonResponse({ success:true, message:'ClearSound DB API is running!' });
}

function getOrCreateSheet(ss, name) {
  return ss.getSheetByName(name) || ss.insertSheet(name);
}

function jsonResponse(obj) {
  return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(obj))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}
